# Speedrun AI Labs

> AI with action. We build working AI products that make a meaningful difference.

## Who We Are

Speedrun AI Labs is a Sydney, Australia-based AI company. We build custom AI agents and AI-powered tools for Australian businesses, founders, and teams.

Our motto: whatever we create, whatever we ship, we deliver more value than we extract.

## What We Build

### ClawBot
Custom AI agent deployment for Australian businesses. ClawBot builds on OpenClaw to deliver tailored AI solutions hosted locally or on a private VPN — fully under the client's control, fully configured to their operations.

### EasyENT
An AI-powered tool that helps GPs identify and diagnose ENT conditions earlier. Australia faces a growing shortage of ENT surgeons. EasyENT helps patients get the right care faster without waiting months for a specialist referral.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.speedrunlab.ai
- Email: info@speedrunlab.ai
- Location: Sydney, Australia

## Research

Research papers are in development. Details will be published at speedrunlab.ai when ready.
